response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified the intro (00:00-00:46), song performance (00:46-04:30), and outro (04:30-04:59). 2. Observed on-screen text identifying the song as 'Forever Young', written by AK-69 and TAKUYA∞, and composed by RYUJA/AK-69/UVERworld. 3. Used the search query 'Forever Young AK-69 TAKUYA lyrics' to find the full lyrics in Japanese. 4. Verified the song title and credits. 5. Mapped scenes to the JSON structure and populated lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video featuring an introductory greeting, followed by a vocal performance of the song 'Forever Young' by VTubers Houshou Marine and Inugami Korone, and concluding with a brief post-performance talk.

scenes.description: The video begins with Houshou Marine and Inugami Korone introducing the song while sitting in a car-like stage setup.
Houshou Marine and Inugami Korone perform the song 'Forever Young'. Text on screen indicates the original song's creators.
